title: Matt Pocock’s Agentic Engineering Workflow (just copy him)
summary: David Ondrej discusses Matt Pocock's agentic engineering workflow as an exemplary approach to coding with AI. The video showcases workflow patterns from a recognized AI practitioner in a podcast format.
writeup: David Ondrej walks through Matt Pocock's agentic engineering workflow as a model for coding with AI, presented in a podcast format. The video highlights the specific workflow patterns Pocock uses, drawing on prompt engineering and AI-assisted development. The framing positions Pocock as a recognized practitioner whose process is worth copying directly.
